word: H6694 - צוּק - tsûwq - tsook - Be molten

sections.paragraph:
Original: צוּק

Transliteration: tsûq

Phonetic: tsook

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to pour out, melt

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H6693 through the idea of narrowness (of orifice)]

TWOT entry: 1896

Part(s) of speech: Verb
